title: Anti-Hero
why_this_song: Anti-Hero by Taylor Swift (2022) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "It's me"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'm the problem, it's me"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Everybody agrees"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Everybody agrees"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I have this thing where I get older but just never wiser"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "problem" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "problem" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I wake up screaming from dreaming

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When my depression works the graveyard shift
Did you hear my covert narcissism

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Taylor Swift one question about "Anti-Hero", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Taylor Swift sobre "Anti-Hero", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Anti-Hero" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Anti-Hero" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Anti-Hero" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Anti-Hero" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
